statement: For every f in V there are finite core functions f_N with f_N -> f in the augmented graph norm and R_aug,N f_N -> R_aug f in the transported graph-dual trace topology.

graphRecoveryInputStatus.label: graph recovery input
graphRecoveryInputStatus.reason: Finite smooth core functions recover f in the completed graph norm.

traceRecoveryInputStatus.label: trace recovery input
traceRecoveryInputStatus.reason: The same recovery sequence recovers R_aug f in graph-dual trace topology.

moscoLimsupStatus.label: Mosco limsup recovery
moscoLimsupStatus.reason: Graph recovery supplies f_N -> f; trace recovery supplies R_aug,N f_N -> R_aug f.  Together these are exactly the Mosco limsup recovery statement.

proof: Import the graph-norm recovery sequence theorem.
Import the trace recovery sequence theorem.
Combine the two recovered convergences in the product graph/trace topology.
